narrative:
Commercial Point-East (precinct in Pickaway County) has 812 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
